item.title: Have you wiped yet ?
item.dc:creator: TheReturnOfMadJuan

item.title: Saturday WHOLESOME dump of smiles and good feelings #721
item.description:
1. Aww, that careful little bite not to hurt the kid... such a nice doggie
2. Pigeon: Yo that's my jam
3. Kitty: MINE
4. Smol pup
5. Stan Lee legit fangirling over Wolverine
6. Taking match photos with a 100 year old camera
7. All aboard the doggy bus!
8. AMAZING! Wish books would come stuff like this, I would buy so hard
9.
10. Labs and water!
11. She is a literal homewrecker!
12. Just sitting and enjoying life
13
14. The satisfying sounds of turning on game consoles :)))
5. Hello friendos, for the 20 months, I’ve been working on a game that’s very close to my heart. "Do Not Press The Button Or You'll Delete The Multiverse" is a quirky adventure crafted with love and passion by two brothers who grew up neglecting their homework and playing PC and NES games. (Legit the biggest punishment that our parents could dish out at us was not to ground us but take away the PC monitor :D ). As indie developers, we rely on your support to bring our game toa life. By adding it to your wishlist, you’re helping us reach more players and make a big impact in the gaming community. https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. Yes, you can play with this dapper gentlemen right here : )
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: So, passes another soul across the rainbow bridge. Hobbit was a good boy.

Teefs
He loved to play
Loved his naps too
I wish we had be more time
I'll miss you buddy. Goodbye.

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1280 (absolutely harmless songbird)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Did you know that in the middle ages, rowboat jousting was an actual thing?
Having someone light a cigar like this for me is now on my bucket list I guess.
If I ever do the dating profile thing again, I'll be sure to put a photo of me in my Scythian gear with the caption, "Willing to be a Steppe dad."
Also, my father, my high school bullies, some former bosses....some exes... former friends.... former enemies...
I don't wanna be on this ride anymore. Would someone from Europe or Canada PLEASE marry me and get me out of this hellhole, PRETTY, please?
I mean, they want to take our postal service from us, and I'm not talking about the emo band, either. They literally don't want us writing to one another. Or sending letters. Or cookies. They don't want you to send cookies. Write your senators and representatives.
Or slaughter them for their sins against their constituents, whatever, though for legal reasons, this sentence is totally a joke. Much like the American government.
I'd almost rather live in Skyrim right now.
Let's get into some good trouble, guys.
Me asking a coworker yesterday if she'd seen the new Star Trek and saying that I would be willing to join her if she wanted to catch up may have been responsible for everyone receiving an email re-iteration of the company's sexual harassment policy today. This makes me feel like absolute slime, so I'm just not going to talk to my female coworkers umprompted anymore and will give no personal details of likes, dislikes, or interests. I am honestly very phobic about seeming creepy and giving any sort of attention that could be seen as unwelcome, and my operating conclusion is that ANY attention from me is unwelcome. I ain't as handsome as Luigi, nor have I killed as many CEOs to be seen as attractive.
Oh shit, this meme violates those rules.
(I may be misinterpreting something else going on, but I haven't seen anything that could qualify or know of anything going on elsewhere that could qualify? But it's best to isolate myself from any coworkers I might offend by accident and unknowingly in my autistic ignorance.) There are times I wish I was asexual and aromantic. Maybe I wouldn't crave human contact so much. I could be a good little desert Hermit/monk.
Actually don't, your wife is probably going to die in childbirth at the rate this shit is falling apart.
I need a replica of one of these for my Bronze-age Wizard so bad. Also, that guy needs a name, too. I wonder what the Proto-Indo-European or Proto-germanic name for the Hoopoe was. Or the Wryneck. Both of those seem like perfectly cromulent magical birds to me.
Roman stereotypes.
Yeah. I need to do this.
I wish I could save the day by making it weird.
I don't know how me and my date are going to ride Pippin around, though, he's pretty small. Though I don't know where I'd even meet a date....
It's this one.
I don't. That's my problem. I wish I was neurotypical. I bet I'd be happier.
This would make his job easier.
Meh.
I'm trying. I'm trying. Are you?
Moooooooooosssssss
I did have a fascinating (to me, anyway) shower thought this morning, though: there's plenty of archaeological, ethnographic, and ethnobotanic evidence for the use of Agave amongst the Hisat'sinom/Southern Sinagua people here in the Verde Valley, up into the historic period, but I'm not aware of any at all amongst the ancestral and modern Pueblo populations north of Flagstaff into the Hopi mesas, and east into the Chacoan heartland. Why? Is it as simple as Agave doesn't or even can't grow on the Colorado Plateau? Or is it a lack of research? I'm now wondering.
Yeah. Exactly. God, I miss having hope we'd have a Star Trek future. Now it's just mirror universe shit.
This. This is one of the few things that keeps the fire in my soul from burning out--this, and knowing he'd be Just As Angry as I am.
Yeah, pretty much. Tell me you're into me and tell me what you want me to do, please.
When are we going to realize that we have nothing to lose by burning down this whole place ourselves, and doing it just to spite those motherfuckers? If we can't burn them, let us burn the world around us so it's useless to them. Not my ideal solution, but it has crossed my mind.
More like full of finches/canaries, but yeah.
Shrikes endorse the impalement of fascists. Be a shrike, impale a fascist today, whether literally or metaphorically.
Hi Dennis.
I honestly don't know what hope feels like anymore. I pretty much go to bed at 9pm, wake up at 6am, sleep uneasily, awake from dreams screaming with Pippin sometimes whispering "itsokay itsokay love you too" at me. What little energy I have goes to collecting a few memes a day, posting them, hoping to feed some sort of flame of resistance.
My suggestion has been redacted for gratuitous amounts of blood pouring from the ruling class.
Pippin tax. Today's message from Pippin: "Peek-a-boo! Pretty bird." Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal, and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them, and tell them they're free to message me.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Caturday: Lethe by Narga Lifestream
item.description:
Model: Narga Lifestream Cosplay: Lethe (Fire Emblem) https://www.instagram.com/narga_lifestream/?hl=en
For reference Lethe is one of my favorite Fire Emblem characters, so seeing a cosplay this detailed and accurate is pretty cool.
